steps.title: Identify the trig ratio
steps.content: In the right triangle, side $SR$ has length $17$ and is opposite angle $Q$. The side $QS$ is the hypotenuse, and the question asks for an expression for that length.

steps.title: Use sine for opposite side
steps.content: The sine ratio relates the opposite side and the hypotenuse: $$\sin Q=\frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}=\frac{17}{QS}$$

steps.title: Solve for the hypotenuse
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $QS$, then divide by $\sin Q$: $$QS\sin Q=17$$ $$QS=\frac{17}{\sin Q}$$ The answer is D.
